message:
test(compact): improve internal/compact coverage from 54.9% to 87.9%

Add comprehensive unit tests for New constructor, CompactTier1 error
paths, CompactTier1Single, CompactTier2, and SummarizeTier1 with audit.
Fix nil pointer dereference in New when API key is missing (typed nil
*HaikuClient assigned to summarizer interface caused panic in type
assertion).

Closes bd-thgk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
